creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Committed, with minor changes:

Remove sourceforge from WWW, no recent activity there
Note to recheck BROKEN entries for MIPS, since simde use changed
Fix tab alignments in Makefile, add tab to DISTVERSIONPREFIX for easier parsing
pkg-descr:
    Fix grammatical errors
    Clarify bwa commands
    fmt -w 70
